summary: Completed testing of GST auto-fetch and IGST display features. All backend APIs working (100% pass). Frontend GST auto-fetch on Suppliers page working correctly - state auto-populated from GSTIN. Invoice IGST vs CGST+SGST display working correctly for interstate and intrastate transactions.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for {DialogContent} - accessibility issue but non-blocking

details: Valid Karnataka GSTIN (29AABCU9603R1ZM) returns state_name='Karnataka', valid=true
Entering 15-digit GSTIN triggers backend lookup automatically
State dropdown auto-populated with 'Karnataka' for GSTIN starting with '29'
Fetch button visible for manual re-fetch

features_tested.feature: Invoice GST Fields (is_interstate, cgst_amount, sgst_amount, igst_amount)
details: Interstate invoice saves is_interstate=true, igst_amount=360, cgst=0, sgst=0
Intrastate invoice saves is_interstate=false, cgst_amount=450, sgst_amount=450, igst=0
Retrieved invoices include all GST fields

features_tested.feature: Invoice View Modal - IGST vs CGST+SGST Display
details: Interstate invoice (INV-2602-0001) shows 'IGST' with orange 'Interstate' badge and ₹360.00
Supplier created with gst_number, state, city, pincode fields
Supplier API returns all GST-related fields

critical_code_review_comments: GST lookup endpoint at /api/gst/lookup/{gstin} correctly validates format and extracts state from first 2 digits
External GST API (gstincheck.co.in) integration implemented with proper error handling
InvoiceCreate model properly includes is_interstate, cgst_amount, sgst_amount, igst_amount fields
Invoice document stores all GST fields for proper display
Frontend SuppliersPage.js fetchSupplierByGST function uses backend API and auto-populates state
InvoicesPage.js saveInvoice calculates IGST vs CGST+SGST based on isInterstate flag
View invoice modal and print preview correctly show IGST for interstate, CGST+SGST for intrastate
seed_data_creation: Created test invoices: TEST_Interstate Customer (INV-2602-0001), TEST_Intrastate Customer (INV-2602-0002) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: GST auto-fetch feature working on Suppliers page - enter 15-digit GSTIN and state auto-populates. Invoice IGST vs CGST+SGST display working - check is_interstate field to determine which tax breakdown to show. Backend GST lookup API at /api/gst/lookup/{gstin} validates format and returns state_name. Test GSTIN: 29AABCU9603R1ZM (Karnataka)
